The evidence

Each row is one thing we can point to in the book, and what corroborates it outside the book. The chain is the record.

What
Owner / institutional stamp
Where in the book
In the book
What it says
“fly Heb = Kosher beshechita Chaim David Gassner Podlin; tpHeb/rom = Kosher beshechita ve-bodek Nagyor [Czechoslovakia] Chaim David Gassner; fly Heb = Aharon Plocher bookstore Brook”
Corroborated by

Confidence — Inferred — name match

A personal or institutional stamp names an owner whose name appears on the victim and community lists; a direct depot mark is absent.
